compare.mode: exact RGBA pixel equality over full_pc34_viewport
compare.promotionRule: Only promote beyond blocker when both required artifacts exist for the same state and mismatch count is zero.

firestaffCapture.runtime: Firestaff DM1 V2 renderer using decoded canonical DUNGEON.DAT state

knownBlocker: No matched original/ReDMCSB and Firestaff entry-state viewport PNG pair is present in this pass.

referenceCapture.routeRequirement: validated route must leave entrance/menu and land on map=0 x=1 y=3 dir=2 before capture; do not infer from a screenshot alone
